summary: Iteration 27: Verified all viral engagement features for Hönsgården app. Backend APIs (flock-comparison, percentile, leaderboard, generate-image) all pass 10/10 tests. Frontend tested on both mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x800) viewports - all viral sections rendering correctly.

backend_tests.test_flock_comparison_authenticated: PASS - Returns app_avg_eggs_per_day, user_avg_eggs_per_day, percent_difference, comparison_text, status
backend_tests.test_percentile_authenticated: PASS - Returns percentile, badge, message, user_eggs_this_week, tips
backend_tests.test_leaderboard_authenticated: PASS - Returns leaderboard array with name, eggs_per_day, total_eggs

mobile_viewport_test.login_flow: PASS - Cookie banner, login form, submit all working
mobile_viewport_test.flock_comparison_section: PASS - data-testid='flock-comparison' present, showing user vs app average
mobile_viewport_test.leaderboard_section: PASS - data-testid='leaderboard' present, showing top flocks
mobile_viewport_test.share_button: PASS - Generates PNG image in modal with download/copy options

desktop_viewport_test.flock_comparison_section: PASS - Shows 'Hur presterar din flock?' with stats
desktop_viewport_test.share_modal: PASS - 'Dela din statistik' modal with generated image, 'Ladda ner bild', 'Kopiera text' buttons

statistics_page.tabs_working: PASS - Översikt, Per höna, Grafer tabs all clickable
statistics_page.chart_container_height: PASS - 240px height as per Statistics.css line 545

flock_comparison.functionality: Shows user vs app average eggs/day with percentage difference

percentile_ranking.functionality: Shows user percentile (top X%) with badge and tips if below average

leaderboard.functionality: Shows 'Veckans toppflockar' with ranked users (first name only for privacy)

shareable_image.ui_component: Share modal triggered by 'Dela resultat' button
shareable_image.functionality: Generates 1200x630 PNG with user stats, app average, percentage badge

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all flows verified on mobile and desktop)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All viral engagement features verified working: FlockComparison (data-testid='flock-comparison'), Leaderboard (data-testid='leaderboard'), Share image generation. Statistics page charts rendering. Test credentials: test2@honsgarden.se / test123
